metadata.description: Gnayj's private plugin marketplace. Hosts ccsop — the Claude Code SOP delivery-workflow framework.

plugins.name: ccsop
plugins.description: Claude Code SOP framework: an installable plugin packaging a document-driven delivery SOP, dual-model collaboration protocol, pluggable review MCP bridge (codex | claude | manual), tiered subagents, skills, doc scaffolding, and a model-tier strategy. Install, then run /sop-init.
